src/main/java/no/rutebanken/extime/conve.general_idea: Replace javax.xml.bind imports with jakarta.xml.bind to align with Spring Boot 3 and Jakarta EE 9+ namespace changes.
src/main/java/no/rutebanken/extime/conve.why_exists: javax.xml.bind package is removed in Java 11+ and not present in Jakarta EE 9+ runtimes; code fails to compile without the jakarta namespace.

src/main/java/no/rutebanken/extime/conve.general_idea: Migrate JAXB import from javax.xml.bind to jakarta.xml.bind to align with Jakarta EE namespace changes in Spring Boot 3 and Java 21.
src/main/java/no/rutebanken/extime/conve.why_exists: javax.xml.bind package is removed from the JDK in Java 11+ and not present in Spring Boot 3 classpath; code fails to compile with 'package javax.xml.bind does not exist'.

src/main/java/no/rutebanken/extime/conve.general_idea: Migrate the import statement for the PostConstruct annotation from the javax.annotation package to the jakarta.annotation package.
src/main/java/no/rutebanken/extime/conve.why_exists: The javax.annotation package was removed in Jakarta EE 9+ (and thus Java 21/Spring Boot 3 environments); using the old import causes a compile error 'package javax.annotation does not exist'.

src/main/java/no/rutebanken/extime/conve.general_idea: Replace deprecated javax.xml.datatype API with java.time.Duration for Java 21 compatibility.
src/main/java/no/rutebanken/extime/conve.why_exists: javax.xml.datatype package is part of the legacy JAXB API which was removed from the JDK module system in Java 11 and later; using it without explicit dependencies causes compile errors or NoClassDefFoundError at runtime in Java 21.

src/main/java/no/rutebanken/extime/conve.general_idea: Migrate annotation import from javax.annotation to jakarta.annotation to comply with Jakarta EE 9+ namespace requirements in Spring Boot 3.
src/main/java/no/rutebanken/extime/conve.why_exists: The javax.annotation package is removed in Java 9+ and not present in Jakarta EE 9+ runtimes; using it causes a ClassNotFoundException or compilation error in Spring Boot 3 environments.

src/main/java/no/rutebanken/extime/repos.general_idea: Add missing import for java.io.InputStream to support the new method signature.
src/main/java/no/rutebanken/extime/repos.why_exists: Compilation error: cannot find symbol class InputStream
